title: chenopodium standleyanum
intro: Chenopodium standleyanum, also known as Standleyan's goosefoot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chenopodium standleyanum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Chenopodium standleyanum are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
